en: Hi guys what's up, do you know how such sentences are made, like if you beat me then I will also beat you, when you play then I will also play, as you can see there is a condition in these sentences, like if you do this then this will happen, that's why they are called conditional sentences.

So whenever we make such sentences, in the beginning of which if or when it happens and both the clauses are in future indefinite, so there we make the first clause present indefinite and the second clause in future indefinite, so our first sentence will be, if you beat me I will beat you as well, here you can see that we have made the first clause present indefinite and the second clause in future indefinite, in this clause we have used beat, if you want you can use beat in other clauses, and if you don't want you can't.
And our second sentence will be, when you play I will play, here also if you want you can use play in other clauses and if you want you can leave it.
So if you found the video to be a little informative, then like, subscribe.
